content.en:
Time flies.

It's been a long time.

Ye Tian led a group of Sevenfold Dao Realm and has been roaming this treasure land, the creatures in this treasure land are strange, and some even have special abilities.

Sometimes, it is not necessary to be strong enough to protect this group of Sevenfold Dao Realms, and an accident will still make one of the Sevenfold Dao Realms fall, which is an inevitable situation.

After fighting again and again, plus looking for scraping resources, resting and recovering strength, etc., time passed like this.

A lot of resources have been obtained, but on the bright side, Ye Tian seems to have not found a single item of the fourth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rules.

Instead, it was another copy body, and after a purposeful search, he finally found thirty-six drops of the fourth sequence of Dao rule items.

"You still have to find a little black water, otherwise after you go out, it will be difficult for the Su Domain Lord to explain. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He also began to purposefully take this group of sevenfold to the Dao Realm to search, specifically looking for that kind of ore vein, breaking the ore vein to find black water, but not every kind of ore vein will give birth to black water, it also depends on the probability.

this day.

Ye Tian led this group of sevenfold to the Dao Realm, found such a vein, and after opening it, he really found a drop of black water.

This group of sevenfold supreme Dao realms also saw the importance of this drop of black water, and they didn't say anything on their lips, but they wrote it down in their hearts.

And Ye Tian sealed this drop of black water and put it away in the box.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian found more than ten drops of black water one after another, and it was difficult to continue to find black water.

"Ten drops of black water, that's enough to make a difference!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And, with their footprints all over this treasure land, it's time to leave.

"Let's get out!"

Ye Tian said.

Hearing this, this group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm was excited and greatly relieved.

As long as you go out, there is no danger, otherwise when you encounter here, you often encounter creatures far beyond yourself, and they are also in fear all the time, and no one wants to live such a day!

......

Broken Void River.

The Su Domain Lord was still waiting here, his eyes closed, and he cultivated silently.

Suddenly, she opened her eyes and looked at the rift.

Airplanes!

A group of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm came out.

The leader is Ye Tian.

"Ye Domain Lord, you're finally out!"

Lord Su was excited.

"Well, it's out, and it's been found!" Ye Tian didn't say it explicitly, but the Su Domain Lord heard it.

"Found !!!"

The Su Domain Lord was very excited.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took out ten drops of black water, and took out the countless resources he had found over the years.

And after those sevenfold Dao realms looked at these resources, they counted them a little and passed on the results to the Su Domain Lord.

"Accurate!"

After receiving these sevenfold Dao realm summonses, the Su Domain Lord knew that Ye Tian was not greedy for ink, so he smiled.

"Ye Domain Lord, thirty percent belongs to you, this is what we said!"

Immediately, the Lord of the Su Domain simply divided these resources, and thirty percent of the resources fell into Ye Tian's hands.

As for the ten drops of black water, Ye Tian was also given three drops.

And Ye Tian also showed excitement, he couldn't be too calm!

"Ye Domain Lord, let's go back together!"

Subsequently.

A group of people who know the realm return to the Sioux region.

......

Suo, Fortress No. 1.

After many Supreme Dao Realms came here, Ye Tian said goodbye to the Su Domain Lord and returned to the Winter Night Fortress.

And the Lord of the Su Domain has not gone to the Winter Night Fortress now, she is now sitting in the No. 1 Fortress of the Su Domain.

After Ye Tian left, Su Yalai, the master of the Su Domain, came to the Su Domain and met an old ancestor of the Su Clan, who was also an elder of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

"Qiming Ancestor, this is the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rule items that Ya'er obtained, Ancestor is good at deduction, can you tell me what kind of quality this is, and what is the price of taking it?" Su Ya asked.

In the depths of a palace in the Su Domain, a pair of pupils opened and looked at these black waters through the void.

"There is no need to deduce, this is the black water of the eternal night, high quality, the sequelae are relatively large, it will affect the mood and will, even if it is refined, it will affect the mood, often hallucinations and physical discomfort, and also affect combat effectiveness. You go to the clan to apply for a Taixuan Sacred Heart Fruit, and taking it can protect your mood from damage. As for the damage to the will, it can be restored by repairing tens of thousands of solstice eras. "

Qiming Ancestor pointed out.

"Thank you, Ancestor!"

Su Ya retired.

Subsequently.

She went to the clan to apply for the Taixuan Sacred Heart Fruit.

The Taixuan Sacred Heart Fruit is extremely rare and very valuable, even with her status, she can only apply for one.

Soon, she applied for the Taixuan Sacred Heart Fruit.

"I have to remind the Ye Domain Lord, otherwise he has refined the Eternal Night Black Water, and it won't be good!"

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Not long after Ye Tian came back, he received a summons from the Su Domain Lord.

"Eternal Night Blackwater!"

"Lord Su is not bad, at least remind me, but unfortunately I'm not afraid of this sequelae at all!"

Ye Tian smiled secretly.

Next, he also had to refine the Eternal Night Black Water to comprehend the rules of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao.

Soon, he began refining the second drop of Eternal Night Black Water.

Will-impaired?

The mood is affected, just ignore it!

Anyway, as long as you comprehend a drop of the black water of the eternal night, you will directly scrap this replica body.

And just like that, time passed.

A long time has passed.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body was permeated with the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, although it was very weak, but it was indeed the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

And his body also underwent a slight change under the influence of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

And after comprehending the rules of the fourth sequence of the Dao, his strength has also undergone a drastic increase.

"Now, a weaker Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, I can easily kill him in an instant!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to refine the eternal night black water in his hand, he was not ready to keep it, anyway, his relatives couldn't let them refine these eternal night black water!,

When his strength increases in the future, he can completely obtain better fourth-order supreme rule items, and there is no need to keep the eternal night black water.

In this way, a drop of Eternal Night Black Water was refined by Ye Tian, and his own Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were improved little by little.

......

Broken Void River, inside the treasure land.

Ye Tian also exhausted all the Eternal Night Black Water in his hands.

"The Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule has been raised to the realm of one percent, and the progress is not bad. "

"Keep looking for the Eternal Night Black Water here, and maybe you can find more of the Eternal Night Black Water!"

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he continued to search for the black water of the eternal night, and the time passed.
